LAW AND MOTION 302, NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT VACATED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AND RULED AS FOLLOWS:JUDGE MILLER RECUSES HERSELF FROM THIS CASE. PLAINTIFFS ELIZABETH COOPER, EIM ALTERNATIVE RESOURCES FUND, LP, EIM ALTERNATIVE RESOURCES GP, LLC & EIM ALTERNATIVE RESOURCES MANAGEMENT, LLC'S PETITITON TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD IS CONTINUED TO AUGUST 12, 2013 TO BE HEARD WITH THE PETITION TO VACATE. PETITIONERS ARE TO COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 2.6B. PETITIONERS MUST DELIVER COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOVING PAPERS, INCLUDING A COPY OF THE PETITION, TO DEPARTMENT 302, WITH A COVER LETTER STATING THE NEW HEARING DATE, NO LATER THAN JUNE 28, 2013 AT 4:00 PM OR THE PETITION WILL BE DENIED. ANY EXHIBIT MUST BE SEPARATED BY AN EXHIBIT TAB PER CRC 3.1110(F). THE COURT HAS COURTESY COPIES OF THE OPPOSITION PAPERS. CLERK TO GIVE NOTICE OF THE NEW HEARING DATE. JUDGE: MARLA J.
